title: BioButcher's Mania
description: BioButcher's Delight seeks to add more compatability between Butcher's Delight,   and Biomancy 2!
body:
BioButcher's Delight is a Datapack / Mod that allows compatability between Biomancy and other mods. The list currently includes...
- Butcher's Delight
- Butchery
- Born In Chaos
- I Hate Flesh : Reborn

BioButcher bridges the gap between these mods by adding additional recipes, tags, and adding other quality of life features to further satisfy your fleshy needs. Future mod compatability plans currently include...
- Cold Sweat
- Silent Gear

Feel free to use this mod for your modpacks or other projects, all I ask for is credit! With that being said please don't repost this mod. 

Curseforge Page can be found here! [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biobutchers-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biobutchers-delight)

If for whatever reason you need to contact me, feel free to message me at Discord decembervevo.
